**Egypt's historic World Cup win has sent shockwaves around the globe, with the team's coach dedicating the victory to Palestine as Gaza celebrates.**

## Context / Background
The Egyptian national team has made history by advancing to the next round of the World Cup, with Mohamed Salah leading the charge. The team's victory has been met with widespread celebration, particularly in Gaza, where the news has been welcomed with enthusiasm.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Team | Goals | Penalties |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Egypt | 1(4) | Won |
| Australia | 1(3) | Lost |

> The victory is a testament to the team's determination and perseverance, and we are proud to dedicate it to the people of Palestine.

## What's Next?
The Egyptian team will face their next opponent in the upcoming round, with the schedule to be announced soon. Fans are eagerly awaiting the next match, hoping to see their team continue their winning streak.
